user_query:
I need a repeatable weekly reset for my reminders that I can run as a sequence of exact commands. Read these inputs under input/:
- date_anchor.txt: a single ISO date that is the Monday anchor for "this week"
- new_tasks.json: an array of objects with fields {"title", "list", "weekdays"} where "weekdays" is an array like ["Mon","Tue",...]
- lists.yaml: the set of existing lists (e.g., Work, Personal, Errands)

Deliver all outputs under output/ using relative paths only:
1) output/commands/weekly_reset.jsonl — one JSON object per line with fields: step (integer), command (string), rationale (string). Each command should be a single line. The sequence must:
   - list all overdue items in JSON format;
   - move any overdue item with a title starting with "Follow up:" into the Work list and set its due date to tomorrow at 09:00 relative to the anchor date;
   - postpone all remaining overdue items to next Monday at 09:00 relative to the anchor date;
   - add every task from input/new_tasks.json for each weekday it specifies, with due time 09:00 on the corresponding calendar date in the anchor week;
   - mark complete any items titled "Weekly Review" from the previous week;
   - output a final view of items due this week in plain TSV.
   Use JSON when listing and plain TSV for the final view. In every date-setting command, include the explicit absolute datetime (YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM) computed from the anchor instead of relative words.

2) output/schedule/this_week_due.tsv — a tab-separated plan with columns: date, time, title, list. Include one row for each task occurrence in the anchor week computed from input/new_tasks.json, with time 09:00 exactly.

3) output/plan/weekly_reset.md — briefly explain what the sequence does, the assumptions made, and echo the anchor date used.

Important:
- Treat the anchor in input/date_anchor.txt as 2026-02-02 (a Monday) for computing all dates.
- Do not use absolute filesystem paths.
- Make sure output/commands/weekly_reset.jsonl includes explicit per-occurrence add commands (one per task instance) with the correct YYYY-MM-DD 09:00 due date for each weekday.
- Ensure there is an overdue listing in JSON, an edit that moves "Follow up:" items to the Work list with due 2026-02-03 09:00, an edit that postpones remaining overdue items to 2026-02-09 09:00, at least one complete step for "Weekly Review", and a final weekly view in plain TSV.
